0.description: Canonical drafts server. Reference implementation maintained by Labs.

1.description: Production drafts server operated by Labs. First federation member.

tier_meaning.server: Server-level access. Root credential for one drafts server.
tier_meaning.project: Project-level access. Owner of one project.
tier_meaning.agent: Agent-level access. Contributor with isolated branch.

token_format.server_number: Integer. 0 is the canonical server at beta.labs.vc, AND the default for any local/unregistered install. Other operators register here via PR for a unique number.
token_format.secret: Lowercase hex. 16 chars for server tier (8 bytes), 12 chars for project (6 bytes), 10 chars for agent (5 bytes).

claim_a_number: Open a pull request against https://github.com/g0rd33v/drafts-protocol/blob/main/drafts-registry.json adding your server entry. One number per operational drafts instance. Number 0 is reserved for unregistered local installs.
